log: Implemented new flash light strength control
Added new edge to edge fullscreen display feature
Added new fonts,iconpacks and app icons shapes customisation
Various under-the-hood bug fixes and optimizations
AIDL: Initial LiveDisplay sysfs AIDL implementation
Added auto-brightness toggle to the new Compose QS brightness slider
Added GameSpace (because apparently gaming is life)
Moved 4G, Data Disabled, and Wi-Fi standard icons to Statusbar Tuner
Various under-the-hood bug fixes and optimizations
Added dimming the wallpaper with night features.
Added blur effects on settings search bar
That’s a wrap for Android 15! See you next month as we dive into Android 16.
Improved charging control with optimizations for better battery management.
Added Wi-Fi standard indicator in the status bar.
Added toggle to hide screen capture status from apps
Option to hide ADB and developer setting status
Brought back smartspace start paddings to what they were before.
Used Accent colors for privacy indicators.
Retained the majority of features from the previous update.
Expanded ambient settings, providing additional customization options.
Integrated support for the Flashlight Strength Quick Settings Tile
Added High Touch Polling Rate support, improving touch responsiveness
